eventstream.note: EventStream tab empty - no SSE events delivered to browser

render_generation.note: render-generation failed because generation returned no usable outline data

ui_result.outline_content: Only card number '1' shown, no title or content

comparison.pattern: All Gamma tests show 0 EventStream events regardless of END_STREAM or SSE format changes

diagnosis.root_cause: H2 DATA frames not reaching browser - same issue as #027 and #031. END_STREAM=true change (which fixed Copilot H2 protocol error in #032) did NOT help Gamma.
diagnosis.hypothesis: Gamma's Cloudflare CDN (2606:4700::) may handle H2 differently than Copilot's direct endpoint. The proxy/CDN layer may be buffering or dropping injected DATA frames.
fix_suggestions: Check if Etap is actually sending DATA frames (packet capture on Etap side)
Try is_http2=1 mode instead of is_http2=2 for Gamma
Investigate Cloudflare H2 proxy behavior with injected responses
Consider HTTP/1.1 fallback for Gamma if H2 injection is fundamentally incompatible with CDN
